channel.title: Threat Detection on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Threat Detection on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: AI is accelerating cyberattacks—here’s how to stay ahead
item.description:
Microsoft describes how its identity and security products use unified signals to help teams prevent, detect, and respond to AI-accelerated attacks faster. The post is a security-focused overview rather than a feature release.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: security: AI-powered defense for an AI-accelerated threat landscape
item.description:
Microsoft says it is partnering with Anthropic and other industry players to apply leading AI models, along with its platforms and expertise, to convert AI-driven threat discovery into scalable protection.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
